title: Perturbation
description: A single-axis controlled stress event. Must trace back to at least one story. Only valid signal source for attractor promotion.

story_refs.description: Stories this perturbation is grounded in. Cannot be empty.

axis.description: Single-axis test type. Must be exactly one.

deformation_mode.description: Observable deformation outcome. Null if identity broke (outside envelope).

identity_retained.description: True if Memory Driver + Intensity-3 signature persisted post-perturbation

failure_mode.description: Required when identity_retained is false. Describes the collapse.

fragility_notes.description: Edge warnings: frequency instability, wrapper whiplash, accumulating fragility

evidence.description: Post-perturbation story text or observation confirming deformation
